executive_summary: All 5 user stories (US-001 through US-005) were implemented. The runtime/ directory is correctly created under packages/parallax_cli/ with the full script tree, registry.ts uses runtime/ prefixes with no examples/ references remaining in TypeScript sources, runner.ts correctly implements the runtimeDir-first resolution with repoRoot fallback and error-exit when neither is set, install.ts copies runtime/ in both interactive and non-interactive flows with spinner/logging, and build:linux/build:mac copy runtime/ into dist/runtime/. Two partial-compliance gaps remain: (1) examples/ was not fully removed — its directory structure and a __pycache__ file linger; (2) install.ts resolves the bundled runtime path via import.meta.dir only, which works at dev time but does not switch to dirname(process.execPath) for distributed binary mode as required by the PRD.

verification_by_fr.notes: packages/parallax_cli/runtime/ exists with the full subdirectory tree and all .py files. However, the examples/ directory is not removed or left empty — examples/image/ subtree remains with a stale __pycache__/edit_2511.cpython-312.pyc file.
IMAGE_SCRIPTS, VIDEO_MODEL_CONFIG, and AUDIO_SCRIPTS all use runtime/ prefixes. No examples/ references found in any .ts file under packages/parallax_cli/src/.

ParallaxConfig gains runtimeDir?: string in config.ts. runner.ts resolves scriptBase = runtimeDir ?? repoRoot, preferring runtimeDir. Falls back to repoRoot for dev mode. Prints error and exits with code 1 if neither is configured.

Both interactive and non-interactive flows call copyRuntime() and store runtimeDir in config via applyConfig(). Spinner and console.log messages are present. However, BUNDLED_RUNTIME_DIR uses import.meta.dir only; the PRD requires switching to dirname(process.execPath) at binary runtime so the compiled binary locates runtime/ relative to itself rather than the compile-time source path.
build:linux and build:mac (and build:win) copy runtime/ to dist/runtime/ after compiling the binary. dist/ is in .gitignore which covers dist/runtime/.
cpSync is called with { recursive: true, force: true }, which overwrites existing files on every run, ensuring idempotency.

verification_by_us.notes: AC01 (directory created) ✅. AC02 (scripts moved) ✅. AC03 (examples/ removed or left empty) ❌ — examples/image/ subtree still exists with a __pycache__ artifact. AC04 (typecheck/lint) ✅.
AC01 (path constants use runtime/) ✅. AC02 (no examples/ in TS source) ✅. AC03 (typecheck/lint) ✅.
AC01 (runtimeDir? in ParallaxConfig) ✅. AC02 (join(runtimeDir, scriptRelPath)) ✅. AC03 (repoRoot fallback) ✅. AC04 (error + exit 1 if neither) ✅. AC05 (typecheck) ✅.

AC01 (copies from import.meta.dir at dev time ✅; but does not use dirname(process.execPath) for compiled runtime ❌). AC02 (idempotent via force: true) ✅. AC03 (runtimeDir stored) ✅. AC04 (spinner in interactive) ✅. AC05 (console.log in non-interactive) ✅. AC06 (typecheck) ✅.
AC01 (build scripts updated) ✅. AC02 (build:linux produces dist/runtime/) ✅. AC03 (build:mac produces dist/runtime/) ✅. AC04 (dist/runtime/ ignored via dist/ in .gitignore) ✅. AC05 (typecheck) ✅.

minor_observations: examples/ has a residual __pycache__/edit_2511.cpython-312.pyc file — this is not a Python source file but should be cleaned up (e.g., git rm -r examples/ or a .gitignore pattern for __pycache__).
The PARALLAX_RUNTIME_DIR env var is already wired in config.ts to override runtimeDir, which provides a clean workaround for testing the compiled binary without fixing the import.meta.dir issue.
build:win is included (bonus) but not required by the PRD — no correctness issue.

runner.ts passes cwd: scriptBase to Bun.spawn — when scriptBase is runtimeDir (~/.config/parallax/runtime/), this sets CWD to the installed runtime dir. Callers should be aware that relative paths in Python scripts are resolved from there.
The outro message in runInteractive is in Spanish ('Listo. Ejecuta: parallax create image --help') — minor inconsistency with the English-only rule.
conclusions_and_recommendations: The prototype delivers the core capability: pipeline scripts are now co-located with the CLI package, path constants are updated, and the install command wires runtimeDir into config. Two items need fixing before the feature can be considered production-ready: (1) Remove the examples/ directory remnant (rm -rf examples/ and ensure __pycache__ entries are gitignored); (2) Fix BUNDLED_RUNTIME_DIR in install.ts to use dirname(process.execPath) at runtime (e.g., detect compiled mode via process.argv[0] or Bun.main, or unconditionally use dirname(process.execPath) since it equals the source dir in dev mode too). The outro locale inconsistency (Spanish text) should be corrected to English. All other implementation aspects comply.
